description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: admin), create a new course site in Sakai at http://localhost:8080/portal. You are already logged in. Navigate to the Administration Workspace (click 'Admin Home' tab at the top, then 'Administration Workspace' in the left sidebar), then click 'Worksite Setup'. Click 'New' to create a new site. Select 'course' as the site type. Set the title to "CHEM 201: General Chemistry II" and the description to "Continuation of General Chemistry I. Topics include chemical kinetics, equilibrium, thermodynamics, electrochemistry, and nuclear chemistry. Three hours of lecture and one three-hour lab per week. Prerequisite: CHEM 101 with a grade of C or higher." Make sure the site is published (visible to students). After creating the site, ensure these tools are enabled: Announcements, Assignments, Gradebook, Resources, Syllabus, and Tests & Quizzes.
